scenario: Ky tu khong hop le
note: Lexer gap ky tu khong co trong bang token hop le.

scenario: String literal chua dong
note: Chuoi bat dau bang dau nhay kep nhung khong co dau nhay kep ket thuc.

scenario: Block comment chua dong
note: Comment dang /* ... */ khong co phan dong */.

scenario: Identifier sai nguyen tac chu va so
note: Theo lexer hien tai, chu so chi duoc nam o cuoi identifier; sau so khong duoc quay lai chu cai.

scenario: Identifier chua ky tu la
note: Ky tu $ khong hop le trong identifier.

scenario: Identifier chua ky tu dac biet
note: Lexer hien tai khong ho tro dau gach duoi trong identifier.

scenario: Dung keyword lam ten bien
note: Lexer doc if la token IF, parser mong doi IDENTIFIER sau kieu du lieu.

scenario: Thieu begin
note: Program phai bat dau bang keyword begin.

scenario: Thieu end
note: Program phai ket thuc bang keyword end.

scenario: Thieu dau mo block sau begin
note: Sau begin parser mong doi dau {.

scenario: Thieu dau dong block truoc end
note: Block phai ket thuc bang dau }.

scenario: Thieu dau cham phay sau khai bao
note: Declaration phai ket thuc bang dau ;.

scenario: Thieu dau cham phay sau statement
note: Statement print/input/assign/do-while phai ket thuc dung cu phap, thuong can dau ;.

scenario: Khai bao thieu ten bien
note: Sau kieu du lieu parser mong doi IDENTIFIER.

scenario: Khai bao thieu bieu thuc sau dau gan
note: Sau dau = parser mong doi mot expression hop le.

scenario: Gan thieu dau bang
note: Assignment phai co dang identifier = expr ;.

scenario: Gan thieu bieu thuc
note: Sau dau = parser mong doi mot expression hop le.

scenario: Print thieu dau mo ngoac
example: begin { int x; print x); } end
note: Cu phap print phai la print(expr);.

scenario: Print thieu dau dong ngoac
note: Parser mong doi ) sau expression trong print.

scenario: Input thieu dau mo ngoac
example: begin { int x; input x); } end
note: Cu phap input phai la input(identifier);.

scenario: Input thieu ten bien
note: Sau input( parser mong doi IDENTIFIER.

scenario: Input thieu dau dong ngoac
note: Parser mong doi ) sau ten bien trong input.

scenario: If thieu dau mo ngoac dieu kien
example: begin { if true) then { print(1); } } end
note: Cu phap if phai bat dau bang if (expr).

scenario: If thieu dau dong ngoac dieu kien
note: Parser mong doi ) sau dieu kien if.

scenario: If thieu keyword then
note: Sau dieu kien if parser mong doi keyword then.

scenario: Elseif thieu dau mo ngoac dieu kien
example: begin { if (false) then { print(0); } elseif true) { print(1); } } end
note: Cu phap elseif phai la elseif (expr) statement.

scenario: Elseif thieu dau dong ngoac dieu kien
example: begin { if (false) then { print(0); } elseif (true { print(1); } } end
note: Parser mong doi ) sau dieu kien elseif.

scenario: For thieu dau mo ngoac
example: begin { int i; for i = 0 to 3 step 1) { print(i); } } end
note: Cu phap for phai la for (i = start to end step step).

scenario: For thieu bien vong lap
example: begin { for (= 0 to 3 step 1) { print(1); } } end
note: Sau for( parser mong doi IDENTIFIER.

scenario: For thieu dau gan
example: begin { int i; for (i 0 to 3 step 1) { print(i); } } end
note: Sau bien vong lap parser mong doi dau =.

scenario: For thieu keyword to
example: begin { int i; for (i = 0 3 step 1) { print(i); } } end
note: Sau start expression parser mong doi keyword to.

scenario: For thieu keyword step
example: begin { int i; for (i = 0 to 3 1) { print(i); } } end
note: Sau end expression parser mong doi keyword step.

scenario: For thieu dau dong ngoac
example: begin { int i; for (i = 0 to 3 step 1 { print(i); } } end
note: Parser mong doi ) sau step expression.

scenario: Do-while thieu keyword while
note: Sau body cua do parser mong doi keyword while.

scenario: Do-while thieu dau mo ngoac dieu kien
example: begin { do { print(1); } while true); } end
note: Cu phap while trong do-while phai la while (expr);.

scenario: Do-while thieu dau cham phay cuoi
note: Do-while statement phai ket thuc bang dau ;.

scenario: Statement bat dau bang token khong hop le
note: Statement khong duoc bat dau bang INT_LITERAL.

scenario: Bieu thuc bat dau sai
note: Expression khong the bat dau bang toan tu *.

scenario: Thieu toan hang ben phai
note: Sau toan tu + parser mong doi mot expression/primary hop le.

scenario: Khai bao bien dat sau statement
note: Parser cua project chi cho declaration list dung truoc statement list trong block.

scenario: Khai bao trung bien trong cung scope
example: begin { int x; int x; } end
note: Bien da ton tai trong scope hien tai.

scenario: Dung bien chua khai bao trong assignment
note: Lookup khong tim thay bien x trong cac scope hien co.

scenario: Dung bien chua khai bao trong print
note: Expression Var(x) khong tim thay khai bao.

scenario: Dung bien chua khai bao trong input
note: Input yeu cau bien da duoc khai bao.

scenario: Dung bien chua khai bao trong expression
note: Bien x duoc dung trong bieu thuc nhung chua khai bao.

scenario: Gan sai kieu int nhan bool
example: begin { int x; x = true; } end
note: Khong the assign bool vao bien int.

scenario: Gan sai kieu bool nhan int
note: Khong the assign int vao bien bool.

scenario: Gan sai kieu string nhan int
note: Khong the assign int vao bien string.

scenario: Khai bao co initializer sai kieu
note: Initializer phai gan duoc vao kieu khai bao.

scenario: Auto khong co initializer
note: Bien auto phai co gia tri khoi tao de suy luan kieu.

scenario: Dieu kien if khong phai bool
example: begin { int x = 1; if (x) then { print(x); } } end
note: Condition cua if phai co kieu bool.

scenario: Dieu kien elseif khong phai bool
example: begin { int x = 1; if (false) then { print(0); } elseif (x) { print(1); } } end
note: Condition cua elseif phai co kieu bool.

scenario: Dieu kien while khong phai bool
example: begin { int x = 1; do { print(x); } while (x); } end
note: Condition cua do-while phai co kieu bool.

scenario: Bien vong for khong phai int
example: begin { float i; for (i = 0 to 3 step 1) { print(i); } } end
note: Bien dieu khien for phai co kieu int.

scenario: Start cua for khong phai int
example: begin { int i; for (i = 0.5 to 3 step 1) { print(i); } } end
note: Start/end/step cua for phai la int.

scenario: End cua for khong phai int
example: begin { int i; for (i = 0 to 3.5 step 1) { print(i); } } end
note: Start/end/step cua for phai la int.

scenario: Step cua for khong phai int
example: begin { int i; for (i = 0 to 3 step 1.5) { print(i); } } end
note: Start/end/step cua for phai la int.

scenario: Step cua for bang 0
example: begin { int i; for (i = 0 to 3 step 0) { print(i); } } end
note: Semantic analyzer chan step = 0 de tranh vong lap vo han.

scenario: Toan tu so hoc dung voi bool
note: Cac toan tu + - * / yeu cau operand numeric.

scenario: Toan tu so hoc dung voi string
note: Cac toan tu + - * / yeu cau operand numeric.

scenario: Toan tu so sanh dung voi string
note: Cac toan tu > >= < <= yeu cau operand numeric.

scenario: So sanh bang giua kieu khong tuong thich
note: Toan tu == chi chap nhan hai kieu giong nhau hoac hai kieu numeric.

scenario: Toan tu logic AND dung voi non-bool
note: Toan tu && yeu cau ca hai operand la bool.

scenario: Toan tu logic OR dung voi non-bool
note: Toan tu || yeu cau ca hai operand la bool.

scenario: Toan tu NOT dung voi non-bool
note: Toan tu ! chi chap nhan operand bool.

scenario: Unary minus dung voi string
note: Unary - chi chap nhan int hoac float.

scenario: Unary minus dung voi bool
note: Unary - chi chap nhan int hoac float.
